name: Oda Beren

sheet.name: Oda Beren
sheet.background_story:
A wandering pilgrim burdened by an oath he scarcely comprehends. Driven by an unseen force, his path pulls him toward the unknown. He knows only duty, clad in worn yet unyielding armor, his sword ever at the ready to defend the helpless in places where even light dares not tread.

He is called chosen of an unfathomable purpose; yet he presses on, unaware of his destiny, carrying within him the certainty that in some shadowed corner, his true calling awaits.
